reviews.review_msg: Oh my goodness, when I took PHYS 234 with him, I felt things I had never felt before (not in a good way). A lab notebook/analysis took at least a full 24 hours to do once. On average, you're spending at least 12 hours on analysis. He marks REALLY harshly. I'm pretty sure he's retiring in the summer, so maybe you're safe.
Not organized, does not know how to put across ideas.  Marking is subjective.  I did well in this course but through sheer labour.
